methodology: GW38 final gameweek — all 10 fixtures simultaneous. features.json has fdr=3 uniformly (ETL stub); opponent/home-away context applied from GW38 2025/26 schedule knowledge. Away venues add +0.3 to raw FDR for weighted score. No DGW or BGW possible in GW38.

player_fixtures.name: Gabriel
player_fixtures.note: Home vs relegated Everton. Best DEF fixture in squad. Strong CS and set-piece goal upside.

player_fixtures.name: Saka
player_fixtures.note: Home vs relegated Everton. Arsenal's best attacker in ideal conditions — high G+A ceiling.

player_fixtures.name: Rice
player_fixtures.note: Home vs relegated Everton. CS bonus + set-piece involvement. Arsenal three-way fixture lock.

player_fixtures.name: Verbruggen
player_fixtures.note: Home vs Man Utd (poor season). Brighton solid defensive unit. CS plausible.

player_fixtures.name: Hill
player_fixtures.note: Home vs Crystal Palace. Bournemouth solid at home. Reasonable CS candidate.

player_fixtures.name: Bowen
player_fixtures.note: Away at Tottenham. Hard away trip for current captain. Fixture is the 7th-worst in squad. Captain switch to Saka recommended.

player_fixtures.name: Thiaw
player_fixtures.note: Home vs Aston Villa. Competitive top-half clash. CS not guaranteed but home advantage helps.

player_fixtures.name: Anderson
player_fixtures.note: Away at Chelsea. Challenging away fixture. Forest have been solid but Stamford Bridge is a hard venue.

player_fixtures.name: Casemiro
player_fixtures.note: Away at Brighton. Poor fixture, likely rotation/bench for Man Utd in dead rubber.

player_fixtures.name: B.Fernandes
player_fixtures.note: Away at Brighton. Worst MID fixture in squad. Low motivation risk on final day.

player_fixtures.name: Canvot
player_fixtures.note: Away at Bournemouth. fdr null in features.json — estimated 3. Bench player, moderate fixture.

player_fixtures.name: O'Reilly
player_fixtures.note: Away at Brentford — good fixture on paper but Man City rotation risk is extreme on final day. Bench.

player_fixtures.name: Thiago
player_fixtures.note: Home vs Man City. Brentford host City — tough fixture for any forward. Low attacking ceiling.

player_fixtures.name: Haaland
player_fixtures.note: Away at Brentford (FDR 2) — good fixture but HEAVY ROTATION RISK. If City's title race is settled, Haaland is very likely to be rested on GW38. Confirm team news.

player_fixtures.name: Dubravka
player_fixtures.note: Away vs Sunderland (or similar mid-table). Bench GK for Burnley (relegation/lower tier). No meaningful return expected regardless of fixture.

dgw_alerts.detail: GW38 is the simultaneous season finale — all 20 clubs play exactly once. Double gameweeks are structurally impossible in GW38.

bgw_alerts.detail: Every team plays GW38. No squad player has a blank. All 15 players have a fixture.

rotation_warnings: Haaland (MCI): City rotation on final day is a significant risk. If league position is locked, Haaland likely rests. Confirm Friday/Saturday team news.
O'Reilly (MCI bench): same rotation risk as Haaland — bench asset, very unlikely to feature.
B.Fernandes / Casemiro (MUN): Man Utd away at Brighton on last day — poor fixture and motivation risk for both.
Thiago (BRE): Brentford vs Man City — if City rotate, Brentford fixture gets marginally easier, but still FDR 4 for Thiago's attacking returns.
captaincy_alert: Bowen is currently captained but faces WHU AWAY at Tottenham (weighted FDR 3.3). The three Arsenal assets (Saka, Gabriel, Rice) all have weighted FDR 2.0 home vs relegated Everton. Saka is the recommended captain switch on fixture grounds. If Haaland start is confirmed, Haaland has ceiling advantage but with rotation caveat.
best_def_run: ARS (Gabriel/Rice) HOME vs EVE — best clean sheet fixture in squad. Gabriel (VC) is the top defensive asset.
best_attack_run: ARS (Saka) HOME vs EVE — Arsenal's best attacker vs relegated Everton at the Emirates.
summary: GW38 has no DGW or BGW risk — every player has exactly one fixture. Best squad fixtures: Arsenal triple (Gabriel rank 1, Saka rank 2, Rice rank 3) all HOME vs relegated Everton (weighted FDR 2.0). Worst: Thiago HOME vs Man City (4.0), B.Fernandes AWAY at Brighton (4.3), Haaland AWAY at Brentford (2.3 raw but extreme rotation risk). No DGW/BGW issues. Captain Bowen (AWAY Spurs, 3.3) is a fixture downgrade vs Saka.
